section: WALKS IN SEQUENCE SPACE: MAYNARD-SMITH-GILLESPIE-ORR ADAPTIVE WALKS
subsection: Structure of Adaptive Walks Under the SSWM Model
nearby_text: Using this expression, if the current sequence is the ith-fittest local allele, the mean fitness rank of the next fixed allele is $$ \begin{align*}\sum_{j=1}^{i-1}j\cdot\pi_{j,i}=\sum_{j=1}^{i-1}j\left(\frac{1}{i-1}\sum_{k=j}^{i-1}\frac{1}{k}\right)=\frac{i+2}{4}\end{align*} $$ (27.9c)
